blended.narrative: Bluewood is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 11.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 37".
